1.en: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

3.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
3.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標中毒。

4.en: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
4.zh: 吸收造成傷害的50%HP來回復使用者。

5.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
5.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷。

6.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
6.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標冰凍。

7.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
7.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標麻痺。

9.en: Only works on sleeping targets. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
9.zh: 只對睡眠中的寶可夢有效。吸收造成傷害的50%HP來回復使用者。

10.en: Uses the target's last used move.
10.zh: 使用目標最後使用的招式。

11.en: Raises the user's Attack by one stage.
11.zh: 將使用者的攻擊提升1階。

12.en: Raises the user's Defense by one stage.
12.zh: 將使用者的防禦提升1階。

17.en: Raises the user's evasion by one stage.
17.zh: 將使用者的閃避率提升1階。

19.en: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

20.en: Lowers the target's Defense by one stage.

21.en: Lowers the target's Speed by one stage.

24.en: Lowers the target's accuracy by one stage.
24.zh: 將目標的命中率降低1階。

25.en: Lowers the target's evasion by one stage.
25.zh: 將目標的閃避率降低1階。

26.en: Resets all Pokémon's stats, accuracy, and evasion.
26.zh: 重置所有寶可夢的能力值、命中率及閃避率變化。

27.en: User waits for two turns, then hits back for twice the damage it took.
27.zh: 使用者等待2回合，之後反彈所受傷害的兩倍。

28.en: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
28.zh: 連續2-3回合攻擊，之後使使用者陷入混亂。

29.en: Immediately ends wild battles. Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
29.zh: 立即結束野生寶可夢對戰。強制讓後備寶可夢上場。

31.en: User's type changes to the type of one of its moves at random.
31.zh: 使用者的屬性隨機變為其招式之一的屬性。

32.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
32.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

33.en: Heals the user by half its max HP.

34.en: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.
34.zh: 使目標陷入劇毒狀態，每回合造成的傷害遞增。

35.en: Scatters money on the ground worth five times the user's level.
35.zh: 散布相當於使用者等級五倍金額的錢幣。

36.en: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.
36.zh: 5回合內將受到的特殊攻擊傷害降低50%。

37.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
37.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷、冰凍或麻痺。

38.en: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.
38.zh: 使用者睡眠2回合，完全回復HP，並治癒所有異常狀態。

40.en: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
40.zh: 需要蓄力1回合後再攻擊。

41.en: Inflicts damage equal to half the target's HP.
41.zh: 造成相當於目標50%HP的傷害。

43.en: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
43.zh: 阻止目標逃跑，並連續2-5回合造成傷害。

44.en: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

46.en: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.
46.zh: 若使用者未命中，承受原本可造成傷害50%的傷害。

47.en: Protects the user's stats from being changed by enemy moves.
47.zh: 保護使用者的能力值不被對手的招式改變。

48.en: Increases the user's chance to score a critical hit.
48.zh: 提升使用者的會心一擊率。

49.en: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
49.zh: 以驚人的氣勢撞向對手進行攻擊。使用者也會受到所造成傷害1/4的傷害。

51.en: Raises the user's Attack by two stages.
51.zh: 將使用者的攻擊提升2階。

52.en: Raises the user's Defense by two stages.
52.zh: 將使用者的防禦提升2階。

53.en: Raises the user's Speed by two stages.
53.zh: 將使用者的速度提升2階。

54.en: Raises the user's Special Attack by two stages.
54.zh: 將使用者的特攻提升2階。

55.en: Raises the user's Special Defense by two stages.
55.zh: 將使用者的特防提升2階。

58.en: User becomes a copy of the target until it leaves battle.
58.zh: 使用者在離場前複製目標的外形。

59.en: Lowers the target's Attack by two stages.

60.en: Lowers the target's Defense by two stages.

61.en: Lowers the target's Speed by two stages.

62.en: Lowers the target's Special Attack by two stages.

63.en: Lowers the target's Special Defense by two stages.

66.en: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.
66.zh: 將受到的物理攻擊傷害減半。

69.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Attack by one stage.
69.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的攻擊降低1階。

70.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.
70.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的防禦降低1階。

71.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Speed by one stage.
71.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的速度降低1階。

72.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by one stage.
72.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的特攻降低1階。

73.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by one stage.
73.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的特防降低1階。

74.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage.
74.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的命中率降低1階。

76.en: User charges for one turn before attacking. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
76.zh: 使用者蓄力1回合後攻擊。有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

77.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
77.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標陷入混亂。

78.en: Hits twice in the same turn. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
78.zh: 同回合內命中兩次。有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標中毒。

80.en: Transfers 1/4 of the user's max HP into a substitute, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.
80.zh: 消耗使用者1/4最大HP製造替身，保護使用者免受傷害及異常狀態直到替身消失。

81.en: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
81.zh: 使用者在下一回合需要回復，無法行動。

82.en: If the user is hit after using this move, its Attack rises by one stage.
82.zh: 使用後若被攻擊，使用者的攻擊提升1階。

83.en: Copies the target's last used move.
83.zh: 複製目標最後使用的招式。

84.en: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.
84.zh: 隨機選擇並使用遊戲中任意一個招式。

85.en: Seeds the target, stealing HP from it every turn.
85.zh: 在目標身上種下種子，每回合吸取HP。

87.en: Disables the target's last used move for 1-8 turns.
87.zh: 封鎖目標最後使用的招式1-8回合。

88.en: Inflicts damage equal to the user's level.
88.zh: 造成與使用者等級相等的固定傷害。

89.en: Inflicts damage between 50% and 150% of the user's level.
89.zh: 造成使用者等級50%到150%之間的固定傷害。

90.en: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last physical hit it took.
90.zh: 造成使用者上次受到物理攻擊傷害兩倍的傷害。

91.en: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.
91.zh: 強制目標在2-6回合內每回合重複使用其最後使用的招式。

92.en: Sets the user's and target's HP to the average of their current HP.
92.zh: 將使用者與目標的HP設為兩者當前HP的平均值。

93.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch. Only works if the user is sleeping.
93.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。僅在使用者睡眠時有效。

94.en: Changes the user's type to a random type resistant or immune to the last move used against it.
94.zh: 將使用者的屬性隨機變為對上次受到的攻擊具有抵抗或免疫的屬性。

95.en: Ensures that the user's next move will hit the target.
95.zh: 確保使用者的下一個招式必定命中目標。

96.en: Permanently becomes the target's last used move.
96.zh: 永久變為目標最後使用的招式。

98.en: Randomly uses one of the user's other three moves. Only works if the user is sleeping.
98.zh: 隨機使用使用者其他三個招式之一。僅在使用者睡眠時有效。

99.en: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.
99.zh: 若使用者本回合陷入瀕死，目標也會自動瀕死。

100.en: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
100.zh: 使用者剩餘HP越少，威力越高，最大威力200。

101.en: Lowers the PP of the target's last used move by 4.
101.zh: 將目標最後使用的招式PP降低4點。

102.en: Cannot lower the target's HP below 1.

103.en: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
103.zh: 治癒我方全體的異常狀態。

104.en: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

105.en: Hits three times, increasing power by 100% with each successful hit.
105.zh: 連續命中三次，每次成功命中後威力提升100%。

107.en: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

108.en: Target loses 1/4 its max HP every turn as long as it's asleep.
108.zh: 目標在睡眠期間每回合失去1/4最大HP。

109.en: Raises the user's evasion by two stages.
109.zh: 將使用者的閃避率提升2階。

110.en: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn. Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.
110.zh: 幽靈系消耗50%最大HP每回合傷害目標。其他類型降低速度但提升攻擊和防禦。

112.en: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
112.zh: 本回合內防禦所有攻擊。

113.en: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
113.zh: 散布尖刺，對換場進入的對手寶可夢造成傷害。

114.en: Forces the target to have no evasion, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it's a Ghost.
114.zh: 消除目標的閃避效果，使目標即使是幽靈系也可被一般系和格鬥系招式命中。

115.en: User and target both faint after three turns.
115.zh: 3回合後使用者與目標同時瀕死。

116.en: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
116.zh: 將天氣變為沙暴，持續5回合。

117.en: Prevents the user's HP from lowering below 1 this turn.
117.zh: 本回合內防止使用者HP降至1以下。

118.en: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
118.zh: 連續使用時，每回合威力翻倍，5回合後重置。

119.en: Raises the target's Attack by two stages and confuses the target.
119.zh: 將目標的攻擊提升2階，並使目標陷入混亂。

120.en: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.
120.zh: 連續使用時，每回合威力翻倍，5回合後達到最大值。

121.en: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.
121.zh: 若目標性別相反則陷入著迷，有50%機率無法攻擊使用者。

122.en: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.
122.zh: 友好度越高威力越強，最大威力102。

123.en: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.
123.zh: 隨機造成威力40至120的傷害，或回復目標1/4最大HP。

124.en: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.
124.zh: 友好度越低威力越強，最大威力102。

125.en: Protects the user's field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.
125.zh: 5回合內保護我方不受異常狀態和混亂影響。

126.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target. Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.
126.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷。使凍結狀態的寶可夢解凍。

127.zh: 威力在10至150之間隨機變化。

128.en: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.
128.zh: 允許訓練師將使用者換場，並將效果傳遞給替換的寶可夢。

129.en: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.
129.zh: 對正在換場的寶可夢威力加倍，且可命中換場中的寶可夢。

130.en: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
130.zh: 解除使用者的束縛效果，移除寄生種子，並清除尖刺。

133.en: Heals the user by half its max HP. Affected by weather.
133.zh: 回復使用者50%最大HP，回復量受天氣影響。

136.en: Power and type depend upon user's IVs. Power can range from 30 to 70.
136.zh: 威力和屬性由使用者的個體值決定，威力在30至70之間。

137.en: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
137.zh: 將天氣變為下雨，持續5回合。

138.en: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.
138.zh: 將天氣變為晴天，持續5回合。

139.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Defense by one stage.
139.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將使用者的防禦提升1階。

140.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Attack by one stage.
140.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將使用者的攻擊提升1階。

141.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user's stats by one stage.
141.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將使用者所有能力值各提升1階。

143.en: User pays half its max HP to max out its Attack.
143.zh: 消耗使用者50%最大HP，使攻擊最大化。

144.en: Discards the user's stat changes and copies the target's.
144.zh: 拋棄使用者的能力值變化，複製目標的能力值變化。

145.en: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.
145.zh: 造成使用者上次受到特殊攻擊傷害兩倍的傷害。

146.en: Raises the user's Defense by one stage. User charges for one turn before attacking.
146.zh: 將使用者的防禦提升1階。使用者蓄力1回合後攻擊。

147.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
147.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

148.en: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.
148.zh: 造成普通傷害，且可命中正在使用挖洞的寶可夢。

149.en: Hits the target two turns later.

150.en: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Pokémon in the air.
150.zh: 造成普通傷害，且可命中正在飛行的寶可夢。

151.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
151.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

152.en: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
152.zh: 需要蓄力1回合後再攻擊。

153.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
153.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標麻痺。

154.en: Immediately ends wild battles. No effect otherwise.
154.zh: 立即結束野生寶可夢對戰，在訓練師對戰中無效。

155.en: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.
155.zh: 對訓練師每隻存活的寶可夢各命中一次。

156.en: User flies high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
156.zh: 使用者飛至高空閃避所有攻擊，下一回合命中目標。

157.en: Raises user's Defense by one stage.
157.zh: 將使用者的防禦提升1階。

159.en: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle. Causes the target to flinch.
159.zh: 只能作為進場後的第一個招式使用。使目標畏縮。

160.en: Forced to use this move for several turns. Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
160.zh: 強制連續使用此招式數回合。期間使用者不會陷入睡眠。

161.en: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
161.zh: 最多蓄積三次能量，供吐出和吞噬使用。

162.en: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.

163.en: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two, or full HP after three.
163.zh: 根據蓄力次數回復HP：一次回復1/4、兩次回復1/2、三次完全回復。

165.en: Changes the weather to a hailstorm for five turns.
165.zh: 將天氣變為冰雹，持續5回合。

166.en: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
166.zh: 阻止目標連續2回合使用同一個招式。

167.en: Raises the target's Special Attack by one stage and confuses the target.
167.zh: 將目標的特攻提升1階，並使目標陷入混亂。

169.en: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by two stages. User faints.
169.zh: 將目標的攻擊和特攻各降低2階。使用者陷入瀕死。

170.en: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.
170.zh: 若使用者灼傷、麻痺或中毒，威力加倍。

171.en: If the user takes damage before attacking, the attack is canceled.
171.zh: 若使用者在攻擊前受到傷害，招式取消。

172.en: If the target is paralyzed, inflicts double damage and cures the paralysis.
172.zh: 若目標麻痺，造成兩倍傷害並解除麻痺。

173.en: Redirects the target's single-target effects to the user for this turn.
173.zh: 本回合將目標的單體效果重定向至使用者。

174.en: Uses a move which depends upon the terrain.
174.zh: 使用根據場地效果決定的招式。

175.en: Raises the user's Special Defense by one stage. User's Electric moves have doubled power next turn.
175.zh: 將使用者的特防提升1階。使用者下一回合的電系招式威力加倍。

176.en: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
176.zh: 在接下來數回合內，目標只能使用造成傷害的招式。

177.en: Ally's next move inflicts half more damage.
177.zh: 友方下一個招式的傷害提升50%。

178.zh: 使用者與目標交換持有道具。

180.en: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.
180.zh: 使用者在下一回合結束時回復50%最大HP。

181.en: Randomly selects and uses one of the trainer's other Pokémon's moves.
181.zh: 隨機選擇並使用訓練師其他寶可夢的招式之一。

182.en: Prevents the user from leaving battle. User regains 1/16 of its max HP every turn.
182.zh: 阻止使用者離場。使用者每回合回復1/16最大HP。

183.en: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
183.zh: 造成傷害後，將使用者的攻擊和防禦各降低1階。

184.en: Reflects back the first effect move used on the user this turn.
184.zh: 將本回合對使用者使用的第一個變化招式反彈回去。

185.en: User recovers the item it last used up.
185.zh: 使用者取回最後消耗的道具。

186.en: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.
186.zh: 若使用者本回合攻擊前受到傷害，造成兩倍傷害。

188.en: Target sleeps at the end of the next turn.
188.zh: 目標在下一回合結束時陷入睡眠。

190.en: Lowers the target's HP to equal the user's.
190.zh: 將目標的HP降低至與使用者相同。

191.en: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
191.zh: 使用者剩餘HP越多，威力越高，最大威力150。

192.zh: 使用者與目標交換特性。

193.en: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.
193.zh: 阻止目標使用與使用者相同的招式。

194.en: Cleanses the user of a burn, paralysis, or poison.
194.zh: 治癒使用者的灼傷、麻痺或中毒狀態。

195.en: If the user faints this turn, the PP of the move that fainted it drops to 0.
195.zh: 若使用者本回合瀕死，造成其瀕死的招式PP歸零。

196.en: Steals the target's move, if it's self-targeted.
196.zh: 若目標正在使用對自身的招式，則竊取該招式。

197.en: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.
197.zh: 目標體重越重，威力越高，最大威力120。

198.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.
198.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率依場地效果造成相應的異常狀態。

199.en: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.
199.zh: 捨身衝撞對手進行攻擊。使用者也會受到所造成傷害1/3的傷害。

201.en: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
201.zh: 會心一擊率提升，且有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷。

203.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to badly poison the target.
203.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標陷入劇毒狀態。

204.en: If there is weather, this move has doubled power and the weather's type.
204.zh: 若有天氣效果，此招式威力加倍並變為對應的屬性。

205.en: Lowers the user's Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
205.zh: 造成傷害後，將使用者的特攻降低2階。

206.en: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by one stage.
206.zh: 將目標的攻擊和防禦各降低1階。

207.en: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
207.zh: 將使用者的防禦和特防各提升1階。

208.en: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Bounce and Fly users.
208.zh: 造成普通傷害，且可命中正在使用跳躍或飛翔的寶可夢。

209.en: Raises the user's Attack and Defense by one stage.
209.zh: 將使用者的攻擊和防禦各提升1階。

210.en: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
210.zh: 會心一擊率提升，且有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標中毒。

212.en: Raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.
212.zh: 將使用者的特攻和特防各提升1階。

213.en: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by one stage.
213.zh: 將使用者的攻擊和速度各提升1階。

214.en: User's type changes to match the terrain.
214.zh: 使用者的屬性變為對應當前場地效果的屬性。

215.en: Heals the user by half its max HP.

216.en: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.
216.zh: 5回合內禁用與飛行或浮空相關的招式及免疫效果。

217.en: Forces the target to have no evasion, and allows it to be hit by Psychic moves even if it's Dark.
217.zh: 消除目標的閃避效果，使目標即使是惡系也可被超能力系招式命中。

218.en: If the target is asleep, has double power and wakes it up.
218.zh: 若目標睡眠，威力加倍並將其喚醒。

219.en: Lowers user's Speed by one stage.
219.zh: 將使用者的速度降低1階。

220.en: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.
220.zh: 使用者速度越低，威力越高，最大威力150。

221.en: User faints. Its replacement has its HP fully restored and any major status effect removed.
221.zh: 使用者瀕死，其替換的寶可夢HP完全回復並解除異常狀態。

222.en: Has double power against Pokémon that have less than half their max HP remaining.
222.zh: 對剩餘HP不足50%的寶可夢威力加倍。

223.en: Power and type depend on the held berry.
223.zh: 威力和屬性由持有的樹果決定。

224.zh: 可穿透保護效果命中目標。

225.en: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.
225.zh: 若目標持有樹果，造成兩倍傷害並使用該樹果。

226.en: For three turns, friendly Pokémon have doubled Speed.
226.zh: 3回合內，我方所有寶可夢速度加倍。

227.en: Raises one of a friendly Pokémon's stats at random by two stages.
227.zh: 隨機將我方一隻寶可夢的某項能力值提升2階。

228.en: Strikes back at the last Pokémon to hit the user this turn with 1.5× the damage.
228.zh: 以1.5倍傷害反擊本回合最後攻擊使用者的寶可夢。

229.en: User must switch out after attacking.
229.zh: 攻擊後使用者必須換場。

230.en: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
230.zh: 造成傷害後，將使用者的防禦和特防各降低1階。

231.en: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.
231.zh: 若目標本回合已行動，威力加倍。

232.en: Power is doubled if the target has already received damage this turn.
232.zh: 若目標本回合已受到傷害，威力加倍。

233.zh: 目標無法使用持有道具。

234.en: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.
234.zh: 將持有道具投擲至目標，威力取決於道具種類。

235.en: Transfers the user's major status effect to the target.
235.zh: 將使用者的異常狀態轉移給目標。

236.en: Power increases when this move has less PP, up to a maximum of 200.
236.zh: 此招式剩餘PP越少，威力越高，最大威力200。

237.en: Prevents target from restoring its HP for five turns.

238.en: Power increases against targets with more HP remaining, up to a maximum of 121 power.
238.zh: 目標剩餘HP越多，威力越高，最大威力121。

239.zh: 使用者交換攻擊和防禦的數值。

240.en: Nullifies target's ability until it leaves battle.
240.zh: 封鎖目標的特性直到其離場。

241.en: Prevents the target from scoring critical hits for five turns.
241.zh: 5回合內阻止目標出現會心一擊。

242.en: Uses the target's move against it before it attacks, with power increased by half.
242.zh: 在目標攻擊前，以1.5倍威力搶先使用目標的招式攻擊對方。

243.en: Uses the target's last used move.
243.zh: 使用目標最後使用的招式。

244.en: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.
244.zh: 使用者與目標交換攻擊和特攻的變化階段。

245.en: User swaps Defense and Special Defense changes with the target.
245.zh: 使用者與目標交換防禦和特防的變化階段。

246.en: Power increases against targets with more raised stats, up to a maximum of 200.
246.zh: 目標能力值提升越多，威力越高，最大威力200。

247.en: Can only be used after all of the user's other moves have been used.
247.zh: 只能在使用者其他招式都已使用過後才能使用。

248.en: Changes the target's ability to Insomnia.
248.zh: 將目標的特性變為失眠。

249.en: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.
249.zh: 只對目標即將使用攻擊招式時有效。

250.en: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.
250.zh: 散布毒菱，對換場進入的對手寶可夢造成中毒。

251.en: User and target swap stat changes.
251.zh: 使用者與目標交換能力值的變化階段。

252.en: Restores 1/16 of the user's max HP each turn.
252.zh: 每回合回復使用者1/16最大HP。

253.en: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.
253.zh: 5回合內使用者免疫地面系招式及效果。

254.en: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
254.zh: 使用者也會受到所造成傷害1/3的傷害。有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷。

255.en: User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.
255.zh: 使用者也會受到其最大HP 1/4的傷害。

256.en: User dives underwater, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
256.zh: 使用者潛入水中閃避所有攻擊，下一回合命中目標。

257.en: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
257.zh: 使用者挖掘入地閃避所有攻擊，下一回合命中目標。

258.en: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.
258.zh: 造成普通傷害，且可命中正在使用潛水的寶可夢。

259.en: Lowers the target's evasion by one stage. Removes field effects from the enemy field.
259.zh: 將目標的閃避率降低1階，並移除對手場地的場地效果。

260.en: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.
260.zh: 5回合內，速度較慢的寶可夢優先行動。

261.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
261.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標冰凍。

262.en: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
262.zh: 阻止目標離場，並在2-5回合內每回合造成目標1/16最大HP的傷害。

263.en: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
263.zh: 使用者也會受到所造成傷害1/3的傷害。有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標麻痺。

264.en: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
264.zh: 使用者跳至高空閃避所有攻擊，下一回合命中目標。

266.en: Lowers the target's Special Attack by two stages if it's the opposite gender.
266.zh: 若目標性別相反，將其特攻降低2階。

267.en: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.
267.zh: 對換場進入的對手寶可夢造成傷害。

268.en: Has a higher chance to confuse the target when the recorded sound is louder.
268.zh: 錄製的聲音越大，使目標混亂的機率越高。

269.en: If the user is holding an appropriate plate or drive, the damage inflicted will match it.
269.zh: 若使用者持有相應的石板或驅動器，傷害屬性改變為對應屬性。

270.en: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.
270.zh: 使出渾身力量，捨身向對手進行頭錘攻擊。使用者也會受到所造成傷害1/2的傷害。

271.en: User faints, and its replacement is fully healed.
271.zh: 使用者瀕死，其替換的寶可夢HP完全回復。

272.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by two stages.
272.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將目標的特防降低2階。

273.en: User vanishes, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn. Hits through Protect and Detect.
273.zh: 使用者消失閃避所有攻擊，下一回合命中目標，可穿透守護。

274.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target and a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
274.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷，以及 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

275.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target and a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
275.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標冰凍，以及 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

276.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target and a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
276.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標麻痺，以及 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

277.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by one stage.
277.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率將使用者的特攻提升1階。

278.en: Raises the user's Attack and accuracy by one stage.
278.zh: 將使用者的攻擊和命中率各提升1階。

279.en: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
279.zh: 本回合內防止任何範圍招式命中我方寶可夢。

280.en: Averages Defense and Special Defense with the target.
280.zh: 將使用者與目標的防禦和特防取平均值。

281.en: Averages Attack and Special Attack with the target.
281.zh: 將使用者與目標的攻擊和特攻取平均值。

282.en: All Pokémon's Defense and Special Defense are swapped for 5 turns.
282.zh: 5回合內所有寶可夢的防禦和特防互換。

283.en: Inflicts damage based on the target's Defense, not Special Defense.
283.zh: 以目標的防禦而非特防計算傷害。

284.en: Inflicts double damage if the target is Poisoned.

285.en: Raises the user's Speed by two stages and halves the user's weight.
285.zh: 將使用者的速度提升2階，並將使用者的體重減半。

286.en: Moves have 100% accuracy against the target for three turns.
286.zh: 3回合內對目標的招式必定命中。

287.en: Negates held items for five turns.
287.zh: 5回合內使場上所有道具失效。

288.en: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.
288.zh: 消除對地面系傷害的免疫效果。

290.en: Deals splash damage to Pokémon next to the target.
290.zh: 對目標周圍的寶可夢造成濺射傷害。

291.en: Raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
291.zh: 將使用者的特攻、特防和速度各提升1階。

292.en: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.
292.zh: 使用者體重相對目標越重，威力越高，最大威力120。

293.en: Hits any Pokémon that shares a type with the user.
293.zh: 命中所有與使用者同屬性的寶可夢。

294.en: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.
294.zh: 使用者速度相對目標越快，威力越高，最大威力150。

295.en: Changes the target's type to Water.
295.zh: 將目標的屬性變為水系。

296.en: Inflicts regular damage. Raises the user's Speed by one stage.
296.zh: 造成普通傷害，並將使用者的速度提升1階。

297.en: Lowers the target's Special Defense by two stages.

298.en: Calculates damage with the target's attacking stat.
298.zh: 以目標的攻擊能力值計算傷害。

299.en: Changes the target's ability to Simple.
299.zh: 將目標的特性變為單純。

300.en: Copies the user's ability onto the target.
300.zh: 將使用者的特性複製給目標。

301.en: Makes the target act next this turn.
301.zh: 使目標在本回合立即行動。

302.en: Has double power if it's used more than once per turn.
302.zh: 若同回合使用超過一次，威力加倍。

303.en: Power increases by 100% for each consecutive use by any friendly Pokémon, to a maximum of 200.
303.zh: 我方寶可夢每連續使用一次，威力提升100%，最大威力200。

304.zh: 無視目標的能力值變化。

305.en: Removes all of the target's stat modifiers.
305.zh: 清除目標所有的能力值變化。

306.en: Power is higher the more the user's stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
306.zh: 使用者能力值提升越多，威力越高，最大為31倍。

307.en: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
307.zh: 本回合內防止任何優先度招式命中我方寶可夢。

308.en: User switches places with the friendly Pokémon opposite it.
308.zh: 使用者與對面的友方寶可夢交換位置。

309.en: Raises user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages. Lowers user's Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
309.zh: 將使用者的攻擊、特攻和速度各提升2階，同時將防禦和特防各降低1階。

310.en: Heals the target for half its max HP.

311.en: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.
311.zh: 若目標有異常狀態，威力加倍。

312.en: Carries the target high into the air, dodging all attacks against either, and drops it next turn.
312.zh: 帶著目標飛至高空，雙方閃避所有攻擊，下一回合落下造成傷害。

313.en: Raises the user's Attack by one stage and its Speed by two stages.
313.zh: 將使用者的攻擊提升1階，速度提升2階。

314.en: Ends wild battles. Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
314.zh: 結束野生對戰。強制讓後備寶可夢上場。

316.en: Makes the target act last this turn.
316.zh: 使目標在本回合最後行動。

317.en: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
317.zh: 將使用者的攻擊和特攻各提升1階。

318.en: Has double power if the user has no held item.
318.zh: 若使用者沒有持有道具，威力加倍。

319.zh: 使用者的屬性變為目標的屬性。

320.en: Has double power if a friendly Pokémon fainted last turn.
320.zh: 若上1回合有友方寶可夢瀕死，威力加倍。

321.en: Inflicts damage equal to the user's remaining HP. User faints.
321.zh: 造成與使用者剩餘HP相等的傷害，使用者瀕死。

322.en: Raises the user's Special Attack by three stages.
322.zh: 將使用者的特攻提升3階。

323.en: Raises the user's Attack, Defense, and accuracy by one stage each.
323.zh: 將使用者的攻擊、防禦和命中率各提升1階。

324.en: Gives the user's held item to the target.
324.zh: 將使用者的持有道具給予目標。

325.en: With Grass Pledge, halves opposing Pokémon's Speed for four turns.
325.zh: 與草之誓約配合使用，4回合內將對手速度減半。

326.en: With Water Pledge, doubles the effect chance of friendly Pokémon's moves for four turns.
326.zh: 與水之誓約配合使用，4回合內使我方招式的附加效果機率加倍。

327.en: With Fire Pledge, damages opposing Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP every turn for four turns.
327.zh: 與火之誓約配合使用，4回合內每回合對對手造成1/8最大HP的傷害。

328.en: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.
328.zh: 將使用者的攻擊和特攻各提升1階。

329.en: Raises the user's Defense by three stages.
329.zh: 將使用者的防禦提升3階。

330.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to put the target to sleep.
330.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標睡眠。

331.en: Lowers the target's Speed by one stage.

332.en: Requires a turn to charge before attacking. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
332.zh: 需要蓄力1回合後攻擊。有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標麻痺。

333.en: Requires a turn to charge before attacking. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
333.zh: 需要蓄力1回合後攻擊。有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標灼傷。

334.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
334.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標陷入混亂。

335.en: Lowers the user's Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
335.zh: 將使用者的防禦、特防和速度各降低1階。

336.en: With Fusion Bolt, inflicts double damage.
336.zh: 與聚雷閃擊配合使用，造成兩倍傷害。

337.en: With Fusion Flare, inflicts double damage.
337.zh: 與聚焰衝擊配合使用，造成兩倍傷害。

338.en: Deals both Fighting and Flying-type damage.
338.zh: 同時造成格鬥系和飛行系的傷害。

339.en: Can only be used after the user has eaten a berry.
339.zh: 只能在使用者已食用樹果後使用。

340.en: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all Grass Pokémon in battle by one stage.
340.zh: 提升場上所有草系寶可夢的攻擊和特攻1階。

341.en: Covers the opposing field, lowering opponents' Speed by one stage upon switching in.
341.zh: 覆蓋對手場地，對換場進入的對手速度降低1階。

342.en: Raises the user's Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.
342.zh: 若擊倒目標，使用者的攻擊提升2階。

343.en: Adds Ghost to the target's types.
343.zh: 為目標增加幽靈系屬性。

344.en: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
344.zh: 將目標的攻擊和特攻各降低1階。

345.en: Changes all Normal moves to Electric moves for the rest of the turn.
345.zh: 本回合內將所有一般系招式變為電系招式。

346.en: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.
346.zh: 回復對所有目標造成的總傷害50%的HP。

347.en: Lowers all targets' Attack and Special Attack by one stage. Makes the user switch out.
347.zh: 將所有目標的攻擊和特攻各降低1階，使用者換場。

348.zh: 反轉目標的能力值變化（提升變降低，降低變提升）。

349.en: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
349.zh: 吸收造成傷害的75%來回復使用者。

350.en: Protects all friendly Pokémon from non-damaging moves.
350.zh: 保護我方所有寶可夢免受變化招式影響。

351.en: Raises the Defense of all Grass Pokémon in battle by one stage.
351.zh: 提升場上所有草系寶可夢的防禦1階。

352.en: For five turns, heals all Pokémon on the ground for 1/16 max HP each turn and strengthens their Grass moves to 1.5× their power.
352.zh: 5回合內，每回合回復場上所有寶可夢1/16最大HP，並使草系招式威力提升至1.5倍。

353.en: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming Dragon moves.
353.zh: 5回合內保護場上所有寶可夢免受異常狀態和混亂影響，並將受到的龍系招式威力減半。

354.en: Changes the target's move's type to Electric if it hasn't moved yet this turn.
354.zh: 若目標本回合尚未行動，將其即將使用的招式屬性變為電系。

355.en: Prevents all Pokémon from fleeing or switching out during the next turn.
355.zh: 下一回合內阻止所有寶可夢逃跑或換場。

356.en: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon's Attack by two stages on contact. Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.
356.zh: 防禦攻擊招式，接觸時將攻擊方的攻擊降低2階。使劍盾神獸切換至盾之形態。

357.en: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

358.en: Lowers the target's Special Attack by one stage.

359.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Defense by two stages for each target hit.
359.zh: 每命中一個目標有 $effect_chance% 機率將使用者的防禦提升2階。

362.en: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.
362.zh: 防禦攻擊招式，並對攻擊方造成其最大HP 1/8的傷害。

363.en: Raises a selected ally's Special Defense by one stage.
363.zh: 將選定的友方寶可夢特防提升1階。

364.en: Lowers the target's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.
364.zh: 若目標中毒，將其攻擊、特攻和速度各降低1階。

365.en: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

366.en: Takes one turn to charge, then raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by two stages.
366.zh: 蓄力1回合後，將使用者的特攻、特防和速度各提升2階。

367.en: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with Plus or Minus by one stage.
367.zh: 將所有持有正電或負電特性的友方寶可夢防禦和特防各提升1階。

369.en: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their Electric moves to 1.5× their power.
369.zh: 5回合內阻止場上所有寶可夢陷入睡眠，並使電系招式威力提升至1.5倍。

372.en: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
372.zh: 有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標麻痺。

373.en: Grounds the target, and hits even Flying-type or levitating Pokémon.
373.zh: 使目標著地，且可命中飛行系或浮空的寶可夢。

374.en: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

375.en: Raises the user's Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
375.zh: 造成傷害後，將使用者的攻擊提升1階。

376.en: Adds Grass to the target's types.

377.en: Protects all friendly Pokémon from damaging moves. Only works on the first turn after the user is sent out.
377.zh: 保護我方所有寶可夢免受攻擊招式影響。只能在使用者出場後的第一回合使用。

378.en: Explodes if the target uses a Fire move this turn, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP and preventing the move.
378.zh: 若目標本回合使用火系招式則爆炸，對其造成1/4最大HP的傷害並阻止招式發動。

382.en: Heals the user for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ during a sandstorm.
382.zh: 回復使用者1/2最大HP，沙暴中回復2/3。

383.en: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.
383.zh: 只能作為進場後的第一個招式使用。

384.en: Grants the user protection for the rest of the turn and poisons any Pokémon that tries to use a contact move on it.
384.zh: 本回合內保護使用者，並使嘗試接觸使用者的寶可夢中毒。

387.en: Heals the target for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ on Grassy Terrain.
387.zh: 回復目標1/2最大HP，草木場地中回復2/3。

388.en: Heals the user by the target's current Attack stat and lowers the target's Attack by one stage.
388.zh: 使用者回復與目標攻擊數值相等的HP，同時將目標攻擊降低1階。

389.en: Forces the target's opponents to aim at the target for the rest of the turn.
389.zh: 本回合內迫使目標的對手將招式對準目標。

390.en: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.
390.zh: 使目標中毒，並將其速度降低1階。

391.en: Guarantees a critical hit with the user's next move.
391.zh: 確保使用者的下一個招式必定會心一擊。

392.en: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with Plus or Minus by one stage.
392.zh: 將所有持有正電或負電特性的友方寶可夢攻擊和特攻各提升1階。

393.en: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.
393.zh: 2回合內阻止目標使用音波系招式。

394.en: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.
394.zh: 傷害對手，同時回復我方盟友50%最大HP。

395.en: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their Psychic moves by 50%.
395.zh: 保護場上寶可夢免受優先度招式影響，並使超能力系招式威力提升50%。

396.en: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
396.zh: 造成傷害後，將目標的攻擊降低1階。

397.en: Lowers the target's Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
397.zh: 造成傷害後，將目標的防禦降低1階。

398.en: Removes the user's Fire type after inflicting damage.
398.zh: 造成傷害後，解除使用者的火系屬性。

399.en: Exchanges the user's Speed with the target's.
399.zh: 使用者與目標交換速度數值。

400.en: Cures the target of a major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP.
400.zh: 治癒目標的異常狀態，並使使用者回復50%最大HP。

401.en: Has the same type as the user.

402.en: Nullifies the target's ability if it moves earlier.
402.zh: 若目標先行動，封鎖其特性。

403.en: Forces the target to repeat its last used move.
403.zh: 強制目標重複使用其最後使用的招式。

404.en: Inflicts a burn on any Pokémon that makes contact before the attack.
404.zh: 在攻擊前接觸使用者的寶可夢會被灼傷。

405.en: Lowers the user's Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
405.zh: 造成傷害後，將使用者的防禦降低1階。

406.en: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

407.en: Reduces damage for five turns, but must be used during hail.
407.zh: 減少5回合內受到的傷害，但必須在冰雹天氣中使用。

408.en: Only inflicts damage if the user was hit by a physical move this turn.
408.zh: 只有在使用者本回合受到物理攻擊時才造成傷害。

409.en: Has double power if the user's last move failed.
409.zh: 若使用者上一個招式失敗，威力加倍。

410.en: Steals the target's stat increases, then inflicts damage.
410.zh: 竊取目標的能力值提升效果，再造成傷害。

412.en: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
412.zh: 將目標的攻擊和特攻各降低1階。

413.en: Damages the target for 75% of its remaining HP.
413.zh: 對目標造成相當於其剩餘HP 75%的傷害。

414.en: Raises all of the user's stats by two stages.
414.zh: 將使用者所有能力值各提升2階。

415.en: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain after inflicting damage.
415.zh: 造成傷害後，將場地變為超能力場地。

416.en: Inflicts damage using either Attack or Special Attack stat, whichever is higher.
416.zh: 以使用者攻擊或特攻中較高的數值計算傷害。

417.en: After inflicting damage, causes all Normal-type moves to become Electric-type for the remainder of the turn.
417.zh: 造成傷害後，本回合剩餘時間內所有一般系招式變為電系招式。

418.en: Inflicts damage and removes any terrain present on the battlefield.
418.zh: 造成傷害並移除當前的場地效果。

419.en: Inflicts damage to all opposing Pokémon and increases the user's Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
419.zh: 對所有對手造成傷害，並將使用者的攻擊、防禦、特攻、特防和速度各提升1階。

420.en: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP.
420.zh: 造成傷害，同時使用者承受相當於其最大HP50%的傷害。

421.en: Sets Light Screen on the user's side of the field after inflicting damage.
421.zh: 造成傷害後，在使用者側設置光牆。

422.en: Sets Reflect on the user's side of the field after inflicting damage.
422.zh: 造成傷害後，在使用者側設置反射壁。

423.en: Seeds the target after inflicting damage.
423.zh: 造成傷害後，在目標身上種下寄生種子。

424.en: Cures the entire party of major status effects after inflicting damage.
424.zh: 造成傷害後，治癒我方全體的異常狀態。

425.en: Hits twice in one turn, with a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
425.zh: 1回合內命中兩次，每次有 $effect_chance% 機率使目標畏縮。

443.en: After hitting 2-5 times in a row, boosts the user's Speed by one stage and lowers Defense by one stage.
443.zh: 連續命中2-5次後，提升使用者速度1階並降低防禦1階。

10001.en: Has an increased chance for a critical hit in Hyper Mode.
10001.zh: 在超激化模式下，會心一擊率提升。

10002.en: User receives 1/2 its max HP in recoil.
10002.zh: 使用者也會受到其最大HP 1/2的傷害。

10003.en: Halves HP of all Pokémon on the field. Must recharge.
10003.zh: 使場上所有寶可夢HP減半，下一回合需要回復。

10004.en: Lowers the target's evasion by two stages.
10004.zh: 將目標的閃避率降低2階。

10005.en: Removes Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
10005.zh: 移除光牆、反射壁和神秘守護。

10006.en: Changes the weather to Shadow Sky for five turns.
10006.zh: 將天氣變為暗影天空，持續5回合。
